hero.name: John Lilly
hero.description: I'm a full-stack developer, problem solver, and lifelong learner building modern web experiences, and Star Wars nerd.

about.heading: About Me
description: Hi there! I’m John Lilly, a self-taught developer with a background in communications who found a sustainable way to support my growing family through web development.
Relationships mean everything to me — from my wife and kids to my extended family, my brothers in Youth Apostles, and my coworkers at Apple FCU.

With experience in various CMS platforms, front-end design, API development, database systems, SEO optimization, and accessibility compliance, I’m ready to take on any project that helps people connect and create something meaningful online.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Here are the core services that I offer.

cards.title: Front-End Development
cards.description: Building fast, responsive, and accessible interfaces using modern web technologies like React and Next.js.

cards.title: Content Management Systems
cards.description: Customizing and integrating CMS platforms like WordPress, Umbraco, and Squarespace to make content updates simple and scalable.

cards.title: Back-End Development
cards.description: Building and maintaining the systems behind the scenes that power secure, reliable, and efficient web applications.

cards.title: SEO & Accessibility
cards.description: Optimizing websites for search engines and ensuring every visitor enjoys a seamless, inclusive experience.

cards.title: Website Auditing
cards.description: Reviewing your site’s performance, usability, and structure to uncover opportunities for improvement and growth.

cards.title: UX / UI Prototyping
cards.description: Designing and testing user flows and interfaces that make your digital experience intuitive and visually engaging.

contact.heading: Let's Work Together
contact.description: Have a project in mind or just want to say hello? I'd love to hear from you!
